productDisplayName: Clarks Women Chart Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Handcrafted leather goodness for your feet - with love from clarks. This shoe is moulded to Fit your feet to perfection and designed to add an understated polish to your ensemble. Style this with a lacy pair of ankle socks to add a girly twist to your look. Product Details Black pointy toed shoes with an ankle strap and aling back detail at the heel collar Padded footbed Short block heel with a heel patch on a TPU outsole Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner for added shine
